name: The Quadrilateral Loss: Additivity as a Measurable Behavior of Dense Neural Networks
summary: arXiv:2607.20201v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Additive models buy interpretability by forbidding feature interactions, a constraint that neural instantiations enforce architecturally. We introd...
description: arXiv:2607.20201v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Additive models buy interpretability by forbidding feature interactions, a constraint that neural instantiations enforce architecturally. We introduce the quadrilateral loss, a differentiable penalty that treats additivity as a measurable behavior instead: a second-order mixed difference on pairs of training points swapping one coordinate, which...
author: Antonio Di Cecco
